scorecards.engine_profile: V1700 Literary OS local-first prose authority
reviewer_notes: Prose mode values density, sensory residue, interiority, and longform voice stability.
Scenario-only beat metrics are intentionally excluded from prose scoring.

scorecards.engine_profile: V1700 Literary OS local-first scenario authority
reviewer_notes: Scenario mode values scene action, beat legibility, silence, camera-readiness, and production feasibility.
Prose interiority metrics are intentionally excluded from scenario scoring.
